title: Eosin Y
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2mtln","text":"Preparation of stock and dilution of   ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":37,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"bqhar","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"id":957937,"guid":"43760BED341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Eosin Y powder","mol_weight":0,"sku":"E511-25","url":"https://www.fishersci.com/shop/products/eosin-y-certified-biological-stain-fisher-chemical-2/E51125","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":31,"name":"Fisher Scientific","link":"https://www.fishersci.com/us/en/home.html","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Weigh 2 g of Eosin Y powder Fisher Scientific Catalog #E511-25 and add it to a 1000mL flask It must be Eosin Y disodium salt or it will not dissolve in water.
Add 40 mL of ddwater and swirl to mix
add 160 mL of 95% ethanol and swirl to mix
add 1 mL of Glacial Acetic acid
Use 80% ethanol to dilute stock to the desired concentration of eosin. Working solution should be at pH 3.5 Use drops of Glacial acetic acid to acidify
